reasons: All 7 acceptance criteria are proven by a 39/39 passing recipe on the live iOS bridge.
Badge sign assertions use exact fiber-text reads; visual/mixed ACs have viewport wait_for + claims.must_show screenshots.
AC6 (negative TP trigger) is shown visually (trigger below current, Set enabled) and asserted precisely by a unit test.
better_version_guidance: Input field values cannot be read via getTextByTestId on Mobile (TextInput value is not fiber children), so 'input cleared' is proven by a before/after screenshot pair plus a unit test rather than a single state assertion.
